title: tephroseris lenensis
intro: Tephroseris lenensis, also known as alpine marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The herbal preparations of Tephroseris lenensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to respiratory problems.
